title: hartia villosa var. kwangtungensis
intro: Hartia villosa var. kwangtungensis, also known as Kwangtung hawthorn, is a plant species within the family Rhamnaceae, traditionally used in Chinese medicine. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hartia villosa var. kwangtungensis include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against oxidative stress. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is used to treat a range of conditions, including hypertension, heart disease, and digestive disorders.
